arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 host.

asset_id.description: The unique identifier for the asset on the EC2 host.

auto_placement.description: Indicates if the host supports auto-placement of instances.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the EC2 host is located.

cores.description: The number of cores available on the EC2 host.

host_id.description: The unique identifier for the EC2 host.

host_recovery.description: Indicates if the host is configured for host recovery.

id.description: The ID of the EC2 host.

instance_family.description: The family of instances that the host supports.

instance_type.description: The type of instance that can be launched on the host.

outpost_arn.description: The ARN of the Outpost on which the host is located, if applicable.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the EC2 host.

sockets.description: The number of sockets available on the EC2 host.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the EC2 host.

total_vcpus.description: The total number of virtual CPUs available on the EC2 host.
